features: Timeless Scent: Inspired by classic British florals, April Violets offers a gentle, powdery aroma that evokes charm and femininity.
Light & Refreshing Body Mist: Ideal for daily use, this fine body spray delivers long-lasting freshness without overpowering.
Travel-Friendly Size: Handy 75ml spray fits perfectly in your handbag, gym bag, or carry-on.
Multipack Value: Includes 3 x 75ml bottles, ideal for stocking up or gifting to friends and loved ones.
By Yardley London: A trusted British fragrance house with over 250 years of perfumery expertise.
description: Product description Floral Fragrance for Women: A light and elegant body spray featuring soft violet notes blended with fresh citrus for a refreshing everyday scent. Ingredients Butane, Alcohol Denatured, Propane, Ethane, Parfum (Fragrance), Isopropyl Myristate, Aqua (Water), Glycerine, Viola Odorata Leaf Extract, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Linalool, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate. Safety Warning Flammable. For external use only. See more
